reviews.comment:
Todos orgullosos de pertenecer al ACA. Cómo era antes. El mejor lugar para parar en la ruta. Pedís un sandwich y debe pesar medio kilo. Hasta el perro es simpático.

(Translated by Google)
Everyone's proud to belong to the ACA. It used to be like this. The best place to stop on the road. You order a sandwich and it must weigh half a kilo. Even the dog is friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaamJLV3hBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Utilice los sanitarios están bien eceados. Lo único que deben cambiar los cartelitos que indican la entrada al sanitario por qué varios se equivocaron y entraron al de damaa en lugar de el de caballeros jaja

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are clean. The only thing they should change are the signs indicating the entrance to the restroom because several people made the mistake and went into the women's restroom instead of the men's, haha.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaaHBTNUhREAE
